title: cicerbita lessertiana subsp. dentata
intro: Cicerbita lessertiana subsp. dentata, also known as lesser hawkbit, is a perennial plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, with edible leaves and flowers. The medicinal properties of Cicerbita lessertiana subsp. dentata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cicerbita lessertiana subsp. dentata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be added to salads or used as a cooking green.
